---
description: "Use when writing git commit messages or reviewing commit history. Covers conventional commit types, summary line format, bullet point structure, and scope conventions for this repository."
---
# Git Commit Message Rules

Apply `AGENTS.md` first. `AGENTS.md` now defines the canonical commit message format for this repository.

## Commit Task Delta

- Use this file only when the task is specifically about commit messages or commit packaging.
- Do not introduce an alternate summary/body structure beyond `AGENTS.md`.
- When bullet scopes help, prefer names that match the touched subsystem or test area (for example `agent_tools`, `repo_tools`, or `schema_and_args`).

## Reminder

- This file defines a formatting rule, not a reusable task skill.
